tools.name: curated-sbom
tools.notes: Hand-curated CycloneDX SBOM. Component versions are traced to committed source: STM32Cube FW_F0 pack from lifu-console-bl.ioc; STM32F0xx HAL from stm32f0xx_hal.c version macros; CMSIS from cmsis_version.h / stm32f0xx.h; Secure Engine from its Release_Notes.html; CMOX cryptographic library by byte-identical hash match of lib/libSTM32Cryptographic_CM0_CM0PLUS.a against the STM32CubeExpansion_Crypto_V5.0.0 (X-CUBE-CRYPTOLIB) package. The USB Device Library headers in this tree carry no internal version macros, so that component is pinned to the STM32Cube FW_F0 V1.11.6 pack that delivers them. Core/Src/uECC.c (micro-ecc) and Core/Src/sha256.c are present in the source tree but are not referenced by any CMake source list and are not compiled into the firmware; micro-ecc is recorded below with scope=excluded, and sha256.c (an unattributed standard SHA-256 implementation) is likewise not part of the shipped image.

component.name: open-lifu-console-bl
component.description: Openwater LIFU console secure bootloader (SBSFU) firmware for STM32F072 (Console Power PCB). Single-image build: the Secure Engine is linked directly into the bootloader ELF (no separate SECoreBin binary).

properties.name: openwater:version-source
properties.value: git describe (injected at build time as FW_VERSION)

components.name: STM32Cube MCU Package for STM32F0 (FW_F0)
components.description: STM32Cube firmware package delivering the STM32F0 HAL/LL drivers, CMSIS device files, and ST middleware used by this project.

components.name: STM32F0xx HAL Driver
components.description: Hardware abstraction layer drivers for STM32F0.

components.name: CMSIS Core (Cortex-M)
components.description: Cortex Microcontroller Software Interface Standard core headers.

components.name: CMSIS Device STM32F0xx
components.description: CMSIS device support (headers, startup, system) for STM32F0xx.

components.name: STM32 USB Device Library
components.description: ST USB device core plus DFU class, used by the USB DFU bootloader path. Version pinned to the STM32Cube FW_F0 pack (internal library version macros are not present in the committed headers).

components.name: X-CUBE-SBSFU
components.description: STM32Cube expansion package for Secure Boot and Secure Firmware Update. Provides the SBSFU application code adapted in SBSFU/App and SBSFU/Target and delivers the Secure Engine middleware; ported by Openwater to STM32F072 (Cortex-M0) with cryptography rerouted to the CMOX library.

properties.name: openwater:evidence
properties.value: STM32CubeExpansion_SBSFU_V2.8.0 package: Release_Notes.html v2.8.0 / 05-September-2025; the committed STM32_Secure_Engine v2.5.4 matches the Secure Engine delivered by that package

components.name: STM32 Secure Engine
components.description: Secure Engine (SE) protected firmware services used by the SBSFU secure bootloader. In this single-image build the SE core and the SE crypto backend (SECoreBin/Src) are compiled directly into the bootloader ELF.

components.name: STM32 Cryptographic Library (CMOX, X-CUBE-CRYPTOLIB)
components.description: ST CMOX cryptographic library used for secure boot image verification: SHA-256 and ECDSA P-256 verify via cmox_crypto.h in SECoreBin/Src/se_crypto_bootloader.c.

properties.name: openwater:evidence
properties.value: Middlewares/ST/STM32_Cryptographic/lib/libSTM32Cryptographic_CM0_CM0PLUS.a is byte-identical (SHA-256 af5a92601d536a97cb78760611f94f54026ab75c93a446eba52b2e9e5bdc0317) to the same archive in the STM32CubeExpansion_Crypto_V5.0.0 package (Release_Notes.html: V5.0.0)

components.name: micro-ecc (uECC)
components.author: Kenneth MacKay
components.description: Small ECDH/ECDSA library. Present in the source tree as Core/Src/uECC.c with supporting headers, but not referenced by any CMake source list and not compiled into the firmware image.

properties.name: openwater:evidence
properties.value: Core/Src/uECC.c: Copyright 2014, Kenneth MacKay. Licensed under the BSD 2-clause license. Not present in CMakeLists.txt or cmake/stm32cubemx/CMakeLists.txt source lists.
